services.title: Remote Tech Support
services.headline: Remote help for everyday computer and software problems.
services.summary: For clients with secure remote access in place, we can handle many software and settings issues without an on-site visit.

services.title: Remote Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remote malware cleanup when secure access is already in place.
services.summary: When the device can be reached safely, we can clean up pop-ups, browser hijacks, and similar infections through a remote session.

services.title: 1-on-1 Remote Tech Training
services.headline: Private online help for everyday technology.
services.summary: Patient one-on-one help for people who want guided support with computers, phones, internet basics, or common digital tasks.

services.title: Remote Security Assessment
services.headline: A guided remote review of the security basics.
services.summary: We walk through devices, accounts, browsers, updates, and backups to spot weak points and give you a clear list of what to fix first.

services.title: Privacy Hardening & Digital Safety
services.headline: Remote help tightening the privacy settings that matter.
services.summary: A guided session to clean up browser, device, messaging, DNS, and VPN settings without turning it into a lecture.

services.title: Remote IT & Cybersecurity Tutoring
services.headline: Focused one-on-one help for specific technical topics.
services.summary: Live remote guidance for students and career changers who want help with a class, project, lab, or specific skill area.
